underlying_goal: Review and improve the vector search implementation in their OpenSearch neural service for ecommerce product search, applying best practices from official documentation
friction_detail: Claude did not directly fetch all 22 URLs the user provided, instead relying on web searches and existing knowledge, requiring user to explicitly ask for proper fetching.
brief_summary: User wanted a thorough review and improvement of their OpenSearch vector search implementation using official docs as reference; Claude provided a detailed analysis, explanations, and applied several code fixes iteratively.
